title: SimpleGlowing
description: A Minecraft mod that makes players glow with unique colors, visible through walls.
body:
## 1. 🎯 What it does:
A Minecraft mod that makes players glow with unique colors, visible through walls.
## 2. ✨ Key Features:
8 unique colors (Red, Blue, Green, Yellow, Purple, Cyan, Orange, Pink)
Glowing effect using Minecraft's native status effect
Wall visibility - see players through blocks
HUD display showing all players with their colors
Simple commands to start/stop glowing
🎮 Commands:
- /glowing start - Get assigned a color and start glowing
- /glowing stop - Remove color and stop glowing
- /glowing status - See all players and their colors
- /glowing reset - Reset all color assignments
- /glowing help - Show command help
